label: Attribute Coat A
query: A runway model wearing a black hooded coat over a red top and a black skirt.
rationale: Tests core garment and colour attributes on a real indexed image.

label: Attribute Coat B
query: A male model walking down a runway in a long green patchwork coat with a hood and black pants.
rationale: Tests outerwear, colour, pattern, and bottom matching on a real indexed image.

label: Runway Context A
query: A woman in a beige short-sleeve jacket with light-blue trim and a pale yellow knee-length skirt walking on a fashion-show runway.
rationale: Tests clothing plus the dominant runway context.

label: Runway Context B
query: A model in a bright red dress with black shoes on the runway.
rationale: Tests a simpler runway scene with a strong colour cue.

label: Outdoor Dress A
query: A woman in a fitted brown one-shoulder dress standing outdoors beside a black metal fence.
rationale: Tests garment shape, colour, pose, and outdoor context together.

label: Outdoor Dress B
query: A woman wearing a fitted brown one-shoulder dress outdoors next to a black fence.
rationale: Paraphrase of the same grounded outdoor dress scene for robustness.

label: Style Inference A
query: A casual edgy runway outfit with a sheer beige sleeveless top and flared blue jeans.
rationale: Tests style language alongside garment attributes.

label: Style Inference B
query: A casual stylish outfit with a white lace top, a blue patterned blouse, blue plaid pants, and a brown beret.
rationale: Tests style cues together with accessory and layered-garment grounding.

label: Compositional A
query: A white lace long-sleeve top layered under a blue patterned blouse, with blue plaid pants and a brown beret.
rationale: Tests attribute binding across layered garments, trousers, and an accessory.

label: Compositional B
query: A layered look with a white lace top, blue patterned blouse, blue plaid pants, and a brown beret.
rationale: Paraphrase focused on the same compositional grounding.
